name: chain_package_existing_stack_as_client_service
method: Package existing stack as client service. Write 1-page deliverables menu. Pull 50 B2B SaaS founders from 17K hot leads. Send cold email campaign. First client at $999/mo = proof. Scale to 5 clients =

stages.task: Filter LEDGER/INBOUND_LEADS.csv for B2B SaaS founders with 10-500 employees, seed-Series A, pain signals matching our stack (automation, content, apps, cold outreach)

Audit MONEY_METHODS/, AUTOMATIONS/, deployed apps to create 1-page deliverables menu with 3 tiers: Starter ($499/mo content+distribution), Growth ($999/mo full stack automation), Scale ($2499/mo agency-level)
Write 3-email cold sequence per lead using copy-style.md voice, referencing their specific tech stack gaps, linking to deployed proof (47 live apps, 337 scripts)
Send emails via custom SMTP scripts (NOT Instantly - $0 budget), log to LEDGER/OUTREACH_PIPELINE.csv
Monitor replies, score buying intent, route hot replies to human for call booking
